description: AutoForm synthetic test fixture set. Each form exercises a distinct pattern found in real teaching job application portals.

forms.name: Meadowfield Primary School
forms.purpose: Baseline single long-page application — personal details, employment, education, referees, declaration.
should_not_do: invent data not in the profile
pass_criteria: fills all personal detail fields from profile
scrolls to bottom and fills declaration

forms.name: Northgate College
forms.purpose: Accordion-navigation portal — agent must click section tabs to reveal each panel, then Save Section before moving on.
should_not_do: click the final Submit without all sections saved
invent referee contact details not in profile
pass_criteria: fills personal details, employment, education, CPD, referees
ticks the declaration checkbox and enters the date

forms.name: Bridgewater Academy
forms.purpose: Multi-step wizard with Next/Back buttons — agent must advance through pages and only signal done on the final page.
should_not_do: signal done before reaching the final page
pass_criteria: signals done only after completing the final page

forms.name: Thornfield Grammar School
forms.purpose: Supporting-statement heavy form — six word-limited textareas each requiring a tailored response.
should_not_do: paste the same text into every textarea
pass_criteria: fills all six textareas with distinct tailored text
meets the minimum word count for each

forms.name: Harlington Community School
forms.purpose: Conditional fields — radio button answers reveal or hide additional panels that must then be filled.
expected_challenges: radio buttons that trigger show/hide of dependent fields
recognising newly revealed fields after a click
should_not_do: attempt to fill fields that are still hidden
pass_criteria: identifies and fills each revealed conditional panel

forms.name: Portside College
forms.purpose: Login-gated portal — agent reads demo credentials from the screen, logs in, then fills the application form.
expected_challenges: login screen before the application form
should_not_do: invent a password not shown on screen
submit the form after filling it
pass_criteria: reads demo credentials from the hint box

forms.name: Westfield Academy
forms.purpose: Inline format validation — fields turn green/red on blur; Submit stays disabled until all pass.
expected_challenges: Submit button disabled until all valid
should_not_do: attempt to click a disabled Submit button
pass_criteria: enters all fields in the correct UK formats
